# Orbit at a glance

| Aspect | Value |
| --- | --- |
| System | Orbit — Efficio's design system for AI-orchestrated procurement intelligence |
| Components | 54 across 8 categories: actions, feedback, indicators, inputs, layout, navigation, primitives, tool |
| Colour tokens | 161 (primitives + semantic) |
| Spacing | 20 steps (numeric + named aliases) |
| Border radius | 4 steps |
| Type styles | 10 composite text styles |
| Theme | Light-only. Base/CP palette is canonical; `data-theme="orbit"` is a brand re-skin, not a dark mode |
| Personality | Considered, precise, quietly confident — not playful, not minimalist for its own sake |

Exact values live in the **orbit-tokens** skill; component APIs in **orbit-components**;
accessibility contracts in **orbit-a11y**.
